name: Kashton Task Table Lamp  W/ USB Port - 20 Inch Height - TBL4186 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the sleek Kashton table lamp. Crafted from iron, this 20 inch black lamp adds a contemporary touch to any room. Its minimalist design perfectly complements modern interiors, making it a versatile addition to your home or office. Equipped with a convenient USB port, the Kashton lamp lets you easily charge your devices while enjoying a well-lit environment. Whether placed on a bedside table or a workstation, its functionality meets style effortlessly. Elevate your decor with this practical and elegant lighting solution.
